title: CONNEXIONS - 211info
text: GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM CONNEXIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about community resources and case management which may include, basic needs, medical transportation, healthcare coverage, and medication management. Also provides diapers. 610 NW 11th Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Diapers: Families with children ages 0-3 All other services: vary by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 667-3504 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 667-3504 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Health Issues Diapers Specialized Information and Referral * Health Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEAT INSPECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
